options.formula:
IF(
  {fldzDiFTU6b5uE5sL} = BLANK(), BLANK(),
  IF(
    DATETIME_PARSE({fldzDiFTU6b5uE5sL} & "/" & YEAR(TODAY()), "M/D/YYYY") < TODAY(),
    DATETIME_PARSE({fldzDiFTU6b5uE5sL} & "/" & (YEAR(TODAY())+1), "M/D/YYYY"),
    DATETIME_PARSE({fldzDiFTU6b5uE5sL} & "/" & YEAR(TODAY()), "M/D/YYYY")
  )
)

IF(
  {fld5V4KTRI2qFfi9v} = BLANK(), BLANK(),
  IF(
    DATETIME_PARSE({fld5V4KTRI2qFfi9v} & "/" & YEAR(TODAY()), "M/D/YYYY") < TODAY(),
    DATETIME_PARSE({fld5V4KTRI2qFfi9v} & "/" & (YEAR(TODAY())+1), "M/D/YYYY"),
    DATETIME_PARSE({fld5V4KTRI2qFfi9v} & "/" & YEAR(TODAY()), "M/D/YYYY")
  )
)

options.formula:
IF(
IF(
  OR({fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating - PIP", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = BLANK()),
    BLANK(),
    IF(
      {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",

        {fldxTRouuzpWxwtYH} - {fldqzR01rpLoSlVAU},
        IF(
        OR({fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Reserve", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Reserve-Holding"),
          {fldxTRouuzpWxwtYH} - {fldCMFsyw466xE5ZU},
          BLANK()
      )
    )
) <0
,BLANK(),
IF(
  OR({fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating - PIP", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = BLANK()),
    BLANK(),
    IF(
      {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",

        {fldxTRouuzpWxwtYH} - {fldqzR01rpLoSlVAU},
        IF(
        OR({fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Reserve", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Reserve-Holding"),
          {fldxTRouuzpWxwtYH} - {fldCMFsyw466xE5ZU},
          BLANK()
      )
    )
)
)

fields.description: Shows the positive variance between latest cash balance and target, based on asset subclass.

options.formula:
IF(
  AND(
    {fld7BldjuUV6hAZ92} = "Cash Flow",
    {fldzYcLtnCAVDCYKI} > {fldgJASdlBFFNxhbv},
    {fldmKwmK0pFyPUSg0} <= 730,
    {fldmKwmK0pFyPUSg0} > 0,
    {fldmKwmK0pFyPUSg0}!= BLANK()
    ),
    "Yes",
    IF(
      AND(
        {fld7BldjuUV6hAZ92} = "Cash Flow",
        {fldzYcLtnCAVDCYKI} < {fldgJASdlBFFNxhbv},
        {fldmKwmK0pFyPUSg0} <= 730,
        {fldmKwmK0pFyPUSg0} > 0,
        {fldmKwmK0pFyPUSg0}!= BLANK()
      ),
      "No",
      ""
    )
)

IF(
  AND(
    {fldHZ0fnxHMyzGZEq} = "Active",
    {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
    OR(
      {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active",
      {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active - Construction",
      {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Pending Sale",
      {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Recap"
    ),
    {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
    {fld8bpNOaMPZcsBqO} < 0,
    {fldzYcLtnCAVDCYKI} > 0
  ),
  "Monitor Operating account or Fund with Reserve",
  IF(
    AND(
      {fldHZ0fnxHMyzGZEq} = "Active",
      {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
      OR(
        {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active",
        {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active - Construction",
        {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Pending Sale",
        {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Recap"
      ),
      {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
      {fldNTplBVATZKl9CB} + {fldzYcLtnCAVDCYKI} < {fldqzR01rpLoSlVAU}
    ),
    "Consider Capital Call",
    IF(
      AND(
        {fldHZ0fnxHMyzGZEq} = "Active",
        {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
        OR(
          {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active",
          {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active - Construction",
          {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Pending Sale",
          {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Recap"
        ),
        {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
        {fld8bpNOaMPZcsBqO} > 50000,
        {fldEdPDo2U3nmhPyN} < 0
      ),
      "Fund Reserve",
      IF(
        AND(
          {fldHZ0fnxHMyzGZEq} = "Active",
          {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
          OR(
            {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active",
            {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active - Construction",
            {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Pending Sale",
            {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Recap"
          ),
          {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Operating",
          {fld8bpNOaMPZcsBqO} > 100000,
          {fldEdPDo2U3nmhPyN} >= 0
        ),
        "Distribute funds",
        IF(
          AND(
            {fldHZ0fnxHMyzGZEq} = "Active",
            {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Reserve",
            OR(
              {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active",
              {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Active - Construction",
              {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Pending Sale",
              {fldJwSGkbjze2B1fh} = "Recap"
            ),
            {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln} = "Reserve",
            OR(
              {fldVcbBpRVEeYZwDc} = "Yes",
              {fldVcbBpRVEeYZwDc} = BLANK()
            ),
            {fldEdPDo2U3nmhPyN} > 100000
          ),
          "Transfer to Operating for Distribution",
          ""
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

IF(AND({fld0pzz8wCEmSqaBg}="Monitor Operating account or Fund with Reserve", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln}="Operating"),
    -ROUNDDOWN({fld8bpNOaMPZcsBqO},-3),
IF(
  {fld0pzz8wCEmSqaBg}="Consider Capital Call",
  ROUNDUP({fldqzR01rpLoSlVAU} - {fldNTplBVATZKl9CB} - {fldzYcLtnCAVDCYKI},-4),
  IF(
    {fld0pzz8wCEmSqaBg}="Fund Reserve",
    ROUNDDOWN({fld8bpNOaMPZcsBqO},-4),
    IF(AND({fld0pzz8wCEmSqaBg}="Distribute funds", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln}="Operating"),
    ROUNDDOWN({fld8bpNOaMPZcsBqO},-4),
    IF(AND({fld0pzz8wCEmSqaBg}="Transfer to Operating for Distribution", {fldoZPHnmHhJFo5ln}="Reserve"),
    ROUNDDOWN({fld14XYJ4QP1naPy5},-4),
    BLANK()

    )

    )
  )
)
)

options.formula:
IF( 
  AND(YEAR({flddfCMl1jRZ18s4Z}) = YEAR({fldyjCIl5detqNrqk}), 
  OR({fldYpg18gFzjUk28H}, {fldlQVgmOViyZj5va}), 
  NOT( IS_BEFORE( {fldyjCIl5detqNrqk}, IF({fldYpg18gFzjUk28H}, {fldYpg18gFzjUk28H}, {fldlQVgmOViyZj5va}) ) ), 
  NOT(IS_AFTER({fldyjCIl5detqNrqk}, {flddfCMl1jRZ18s4Z})) ), 
  "Yes", 
  "No" 
  )

IF(
  {fldrXZBfIWzblivET} = "30",
    DATEADD(DATEADD({fldwspR1NSO5uXbJH}, 1, 'month'), -1, 'day'),
    IF(
      {fldrXZBfIWzblivET} = "60",
        DATEADD(DATEADD({fldwspR1NSO5uXbJH}, 2, 'month'), -1, 'day'),
        IF(
          {fldrXZBfIWzblivET} = "90",
            DATEADD(DATEADD({fldwspR1NSO5uXbJH}, 3, 'month'), -1, 'day'),
            BLANK()
        )
    )
)

options.formula:
IF(
  AND(
    OR({fldDOtcIyceEB9ss0}, {fldKZ3yiuIbhJMhR6}),

    DATETIME_DIFF({fldu296dkHo22C8zW}, {fldXFDlJoZnQEAaf1}, 'months') >= 0,
    DATETIME_DIFF({fldu296dkHo22C8zW}, {fldXFDlJoZnQEAaf1}, 'months') <= 11,

    DATETIME_DIFF(
      {fldXFDlJoZnQEAaf1},
      IF({fldDOtcIyceEB9ss0}, {fldDOtcIyceEB9ss0}, {fldKZ3yiuIbhJMhR6}),
      'months'
    ) >= 0
  ),
  "Yes","No"
)

fields.description: Checks if the record is within the trailing twelve months based on date logic.

  OR({fldDOtcIyceEB9ss0}, {fldKZ3yiuIbhJMhR6}), 
  NOT( IS_BEFORE( {fldXFDlJoZnQEAaf1}, IF({fldDOtcIyceEB9ss0}, {fldDOtcIyceEB9ss0}, {fldKZ3yiuIbhJMhR6}) ) ), 
  NOT(IS_AFTER({fldXFDlJoZnQEAaf1}, {fldu296dkHo22C8zW})) ),

  )

options.formula:
IF(
  OR(
    {fldi05Hv2mQnIUAcM} = BLANK(),
    {fldwURX8uRxcSM3HG} = BLANK()
  ),
  BLANK(),
  IF(
    AND({fldi05Hv2mQnIUAcM} > 0, {fldwURX8uRxcSM3HG} > 0),
    "4. Healthy",
    IF(
      AND({fldi05Hv2mQnIUAcM} > 0, {fldwURX8uRxcSM3HG} < 0),
      "3. Momentum",
      IF(
        AND({fldi05Hv2mQnIUAcM} < 0, {fldwURX8uRxcSM3HG} > 0),
        "2. Defensive",
        IF(
          AND({fldi05Hv2mQnIUAcM} < 0, {fldwURX8uRxcSM3HG} < 0),
          "1. Underperforming",
          BLANK()
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

IF(
  AND(
    OR({fldi6ljNbcSS81acs}, {fldf9g4lYrLCcEe5I}),

    DATETIME_DIFF({fldpRXptbSjTwrzBT}, {fldg3sfXGCcdRCUYh}, 'months') >= 0,
    DATETIME_DIFF({fldpRXptbSjTwrzBT}, {fldg3sfXGCcdRCUYh}, 'months') <= 11,

    DATETIME_DIFF(
      {fldg3sfXGCcdRCUYh},
      IF({fldi6ljNbcSS81acs}, {fldi6ljNbcSS81acs}, {fldf9g4lYrLCcEe5I}),
      'months'
    ) >= 0
  ),
  "Yes","No"
)

IF(
  OR(
    {fldqctfqdJNqQQtqu} = BLANK(),
    {fldxySOWBuYk9P4mu} = BLANK()
  ),
  BLANK(),
  IF(
    AND({fldqctfqdJNqQQtqu} > 100, {fldxySOWBuYk9P4mu} > 0),
    "4. Ahead and Gaining",
    IF(
      AND({fldqctfqdJNqQQtqu}> 100, {fldxySOWBuYk9P4mu} < 0),
      "3. Ahead and Losing",
      IF(
        AND({fldqctfqdJNqQQtqu} < 100, {fldxySOWBuYk9P4mu} > 0),
        "2. Behind and Gaining",
        IF(
          AND({fldqctfqdJNqQQtqu} < 100, {fldxySOWBuYk9P4mu} < 0),
          "1. Behind and Losing",
          BLANK()
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

fields.name: STR_weekly_performance
fields.description: Categorizes performance as Ahead/Behind and Gaining/Losing based on RevPAR index and its % change.

options.formula:
IF(
  OR(
    {fldvjePBbqKnAQp3n} = BLANK(),
    {fldCFDo7zbVhTP0Zn} = BLANK()
  ),
  BLANK(),
  IF(
    AND({fldvjePBbqKnAQp3n} > 100, {fldCFDo7zbVhTP0Zn} >= 0),
    "4. Ahead and Gaining",
    IF(
      AND({fldvjePBbqKnAQp3n} > 100, {fldCFDo7zbVhTP0Zn} <= 0),
      "3. Ahead and Losing",
      IF(
        AND({fldvjePBbqKnAQp3n} < 100, {fldCFDo7zbVhTP0Zn} >= 0),
        "2. Behind and Gaining",
        IF(
          AND({fldvjePBbqKnAQp3n} < 100, {fldCFDo7zbVhTP0Zn} <= 0),
          "1. Behind and Losing",
          BLANK()
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

fields.name: STR_28_day_performance

options.formula:
IF(
  {fldyUxSMYAX5BDJxj} = "Yes",
  IF(
    {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ} = BLANK(),
    "",
    IF(
      AND({fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldujVMIS1CkpksP3}, {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldGdVpjPuuzXORlN}, {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldSsXpG07Ztm5Ppa}, {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldCTe5HNsV34rWuC}),
      "4+ weeks",
      IF(
        AND({fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldujVMIS1CkpksP3}, {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldGdVpjPuuzXORlN}, {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldSsXpG07Ztm5Ppa}),
        "4 weeks",
        IF(
          AND({fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldujVMIS1CkpksP3}, {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldGdVpjPuuzXORlN}),
          "3 weeks",
          IF(
            {fldJBG8XM1NQr3ZhQ}={fldujVMIS1CkpksP3},
            "2 weeks",
            "1 week"
          )
        )
      )
    )
  ),
  ""
)
